headline: Ivan Provedel
body: ⚫️🔵🇮🇹 Inter have never been interested in Arsenal GK Kepa despite links. No talks. The goalkeeper they signed is Ivan Provedel from Lazio since two weeks ago, already part of the plans.
raw_text:
⚫️🔵🇮🇹 Inter have never been interested in Arsenal GK Kepa despite links. No talks.

The goalkeeper they signed is Ivan Provedel from Lazio since two weeks ago, already part of the plans.
text:
